text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>11. Bey Herrn Daniel Hag dem Buchbinder sind folgende Bücher, in nachgesetztem Preiß zu verkauffen; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Justi Lipsii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Epistolarum Centuriae complet</TITLE>, in <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> apud Plautin. † <PRIZE>1. Gulden 36. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Politicorum Libri</TITLE>. <BIBL><TITLE>Monita</TITLE> <VOLUME>8e Exempla politica</VOLUME>.</BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>De Magnirudine Romana</TITLE>.</BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>De Constantia</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> ibid. † <PRIZE>fl. 1. xr. 36.</PRIZE></BIBL></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Militia Romana cum An. fig.</TITLE> <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> ibid. † <PRIZE>fl. 1. xr. 30.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Poliorecticon de Machinis, Tormentis, Telis cum An.fig.</TITLE> <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> † <PRIZE>fl. 1. xr. 12.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Amphitheatro</TITLE>. <BIBL><TITLE>de Amphitheatris extra Romam, cum An.fig.</TITLE> <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> ibid. † <PRIZE>30. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Dissert. apud Principes Se C.Plinii Pane-Gyricus cum Commentar.</TITLE> <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>, ibid. † <PRIZE>48. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>C. Corn. Taciti & Velleji Paterculi</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Opera cum Lipsii Commentariis</TITLE>, groß <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT> ibid. † <PRIZE>fl. 3.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Opera cum Notis Integris W. Heinsii & variorum</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>3. Theil</VOLUME> / <PLACE>Lugd.</PLACE> † <PRIZE>fl. 7. xr. 12.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Gotthard Heideggers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Kleinere Teutsche Schrifften</TITLE> / <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> † <PRIZE>30. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Delicia Urbis Bernae</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> † <PRIZE>13. ß.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>J. J. Scheuchzers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Vernunfft-mäßige Undersuchung des Baades zu Baaden, mit Kupfferen</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> † <PRIZE>11. ß.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>J. J. Scheuchzers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Vernunfft-mäßige Undersuchung des Baades zu Baaden, ohne Kupffer</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> † <PRIZE>4. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Milton</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Verlust des Parabieses</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> † <PRIZE>14. ß.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Paragone della Pobsia Tragica dtalia conquella di Francia</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> † <PRIZE>5. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>J. J. Breitingeri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>in Versus obscurciss. Persii diarribe Historico Literaria</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1723.</YEAR> † <PRIZE>1. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Discurse der Mahleren</TITLE>, <VOLUME>4. Theil</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1731.</YEAR> † <PRIZE>16. ß.</PRIZE></BIBL> </ITEM>","number_of_corrections":14,"explanation":"
1. Replaced Unicode escape sequences for corrupted characters: '√ü' → 'ü', '√ü' → 'ß', '√†' → '†', '√§' → 'ä' throughout the document, restoring proper German and Latin text (e.g., 'Bücher', 'Preiß', 'mäßige', 'ß' for Schilling).
2. Replaced the malformed '&' with '&' in two AUTHOR/TITLE fields ('Taciti & Velleji Paterculi' and 'Heinsii & variorum') to make the XML well-formed.
3. Fixed the unclosed/mismatched nested BIBL structure around 'Ejusd. Politicorum Libri' — added a closing </BIBL> tag after the nested De Constantia BIBL to properly close the outer BIBL.
4. Fixed the unclosed/mismatched nested BIBL structure around 'Ejusd. de Amphitheatro' — added a closing </BIBL> tag after the nested Dissert. BIBL to properly close the outer BIBL.
5. Replaced the inconsistent tag <PRICE> (used once for '48. xr.') with <PRIZE> to match the tag used consistently throughout the rest of the document.
6. Removed the stray hyphen in '4to-ibid.' (two occurrences), replacing with a space for cleaner text separation.
7. Removed the hyphen in 'Pane- Gyricus' restoring it to 'Pane-Gyricus' as a single hyphenated word.
"}

parsed.explanation:
1. Replaced Unicode escape sequences for corrupted characters: '√ü' → 'ü', '√ü' → 'ß', '√†' → '†', '√§' → 'ä' throughout the document, restoring proper German and Latin text (e.g., 'Bücher', 'Preiß', 'mäßige', 'ß' for Schilling).
2. Replaced the malformed '&' with '&' in two AUTHOR/TITLE fields ('Taciti & Velleji Paterculi' and 'Heinsii & variorum') to make the XML well-formed.
3. Fixed the unclosed/mismatched nested BIBL structure around 'Ejusd. Politicorum Libri' — added a closing </BIBL> tag after the nested De Constantia BIBL to properly close the outer BIBL.
4. Fixed the unclosed/mismatched nested BIBL structure around 'Ejusd. de Amphitheatro' — added a closing </BIBL> tag after the nested Dissert. BIBL to properly close the outer BIBL.
5. Replaced the inconsistent tag <PRICE> (used once for '48. xr.') with <PRIZE> to match the tag used consistently throughout the rest of the document.
6. Removed the stray hyphen in '4to-ibid.' (two occurrences), replacing with a space for cleaner text separation.
7. Removed the hyphen in 'Pane- Gyricus' restoring it to 'Pane-Gyricus' as a single hyphenated word.
